member.name: T:JordiAragonZaragoza.SharedKernel.Domain.Contracts.Interfaces.IDomainEvent
member.summary: The Event occurs within the problem domain (living inside a bounded context) and is used to communicate a change in the state of the entity. This is a private event part of Ubiquitous Language.

member.name: T:JordiAragonZaragoza.SharedKernel.Domain.Contracts.Interfaces.IEntity`1
member.summary: Generic abstraction for a domain entity.

member.name: T:JordiAragonZaragoza.SharedKernel.Domain.Contracts.Interfaces.IEntity`2
member.summary: Generic abstraction for a domain entity.
member.typeparam: The id value for the entity.

member.name: T:JordiAragonZaragoza.SharedKernel.Domain.Contracts.Interfaces.IEntity
member.summary: Maker interface for a domain entity.

member.name: T:JordiAragonZaragoza.SharedKernel.Domain.Contracts.Interfaces.IEntityId`1
member.summary: Generic abstraction for a entity id.
member.typeparam: The value for the entity id.

member.name: T:JordiAragonZaragoza.SharedKernel.Domain.Contracts.Interfaces.IEntityId
member.summary: Marker interface for an entity id.

member.name: T:JordiAragonZaragoza.SharedKernel.Domain.Contracts.Interfaces.IEventsDispatcherService
member.summary: Defines a contract for dispatching domain events collected during the execution of application logic.

member.name: M:JordiAragonZaragoza.SharedKernel.Domain.Contracts.Interfaces.IEventsDispatcherService.DispatchEventsFromAggregatesStoreAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Dispatches in domain events stored in aggregates store. This should be called just before committing the transaction when using the Unit of Work pattern.
member.param: A token to observe while waiting for the task to complete.
member.returns: A task that represents the asynchronous operation.
